data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for Google handling initial booking data capture.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that 'Google handles initial booking data capture', but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case outlines the need for Google to capture booking data, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific functionality. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of Google handling initial booking data capture.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
